issues.message: No dedicated test exercises the OPTIMIZER_REQUIRED rejection path when optimization.enabled is true
issues.requirement: enforce-optimizer-invocation/spec.md Scenario: summary 缺失时拒绝
issues.recommendation: Add a test case that sends NO_OPTIMIZATION_NEEDED without summary when optimization.enabled is not false, asserting exitCode 1 with reason OPTIMIZER_REQUIRED
issues.evidence: test/commands/verify.test.ts line 138-148 runs with optimization.enabled=false so it hits the config guard before reaching summary validation at verify.ts:242-246

verificationContext.gitDiffSummary: 1 file changed (cosmetic spec section type fix in verify-optimization/spec.md, 2 insertions). All implementation committed at HEAD 065eeb4.

attempts.summary: No optimization opportunities found. The implementation follows existing patterns: guard-clause early returns in handleOptimization, fragment constants for shared prompt text, and template-literal interpolation in workflow builders. No dead code, no redundant logic, no simplification targets.
